name: Laptop Air 13
description: Ultra-portable 13.3-inch laptop perfect for students and mobile professionals. Weighs only 1.2kg with sleek aluminum design. Intel Core i5 processor, 8GB RAM, 256GB SSD. Crystal-clear Full HD display. Up to 12 hours battery life for all-day productivity. Fast charging, Wi-Fi 6, and Bluetooth 5.0. Ideal for everyday computing, web browsing, and office work.

name: Wireless Mouse
description: Ergonomic wireless mouse with precision optical tracking up to 1600 DPI. Comfortable contoured design reduces hand strain during extended use. 2.4GHz wireless connection with nano USB receiver. Six programmable buttons for customized workflow. Long-lasting battery (up to 18 months). Works on multiple surfaces. Compatible with Windows, macOS, and Linux.

name: Mechanical Keyboard RGB
description: Premium mechanical gaming keyboard with customizable RGB backlighting. Cherry MX Blue switches provide tactile feedback and satisfying click. Full-size layout with dedicated media keys and volume wheel. Durable aluminum frame built to last. Per-key RGB lighting with multiple preset effects. N-key rollover and anti-ghosting ensure every keystroke registers. Detachable USB-C cable for easy transport.

name: USB-C Cable 2m
description: Durable 2-meter USB-C cable supporting fast charging up to 100W and data transfer speeds up to 480Mbps. Braided nylon exterior resists tangling and wear. Reinforced connectors withstand 10,000+ bend cycles. Universal compatibility with USB-C devices including laptops, tablets, and smartphones. Supports USB Power Delivery for rapid charging. Perfect length for desk setups and charging from a distance.

name: Wireless Headphones
description: Premium over-ear wireless headphones with active noise cancellation (ANC). 40mm drivers deliver rich, balanced sound with deep bass. Up to 30 hours battery life with ANC on, 40 hours with ANC off. Comfortable memory foam ear cushions for all-day wear. Bluetooth 5.0 with multipoint connection. Built-in microphone for crystal-clear calls. Foldable design with carrying case included.

name: Cotton T-Shirt
description: Premium quality cotton t-shirt with a comfortable, relaxed fit. Made from 100% organic cotton for breathability and softness. Classic crew neck design with reinforced shoulder seams. Perfect for casual wear or layering. Machine washable and pre-shrunk for lasting fit. Available in multiple colors and sizes. Tagless label for added comfort.

name: Hoodie Pullover
description: Cozy pullover hoodie made from soft cotton-polyester blend. Fleece-lined interior provides warmth without bulk. Adjustable drawstring hood and kangaroo pocket. Ribbed cuffs and hem maintain shape after washing. Perfect for layering or wearing alone. Available in classic colors. Unisex sizing for versatile fit.

name: Running Shoes
description: High-performance running shoes engineered for comfort and speed. Breathable mesh upper keeps feet cool. Responsive cushioning absorbs impact and returns energy. Durable rubber outsole provides excellent traction on various surfaces. Lightweight design (only 250g per shoe). Reflective elements enhance visibility. Suitable for road running, gym workouts, and everyday wear.

name: MongoDB Design Patterns
description: Comprehensive guide to MongoDB schema design patterns and best practices. Learn the 7 essential patterns including Embedding, Subset, Polymorphic, Computed, and Outlier patterns. Includes real-world examples and performance optimization techniques. Perfect for developers building scalable applications with MongoDB. Covers data modeling, indexing strategies, and query optimization.

name: JavaScript: The Complete Guide
description: Comprehensive JavaScript guide covering ES6+ features, async programming, and modern frameworks. Learn fundamentals, DOM manipulation, event handling, and advanced concepts. Includes practical projects and exercises. Covers React, Vue, and Node.js basics. Perfect for beginners and intermediate developers looking to master JavaScript.

name: Clean Code Principles
description: Essential guide to writing clean, maintainable code. Learn best practices for naming, functions, comments, and formatting. Covers SOLID principles, design patterns, and refactoring techniques. Includes examples in multiple programming languages. Perfect for developers who want to improve code quality and team collaboration.

name: Backpack Travel Pro
description: Durable travel backpack with 40L capacity and multiple compartments. Water-resistant material protects your belongings. Padded laptop sleeve fits up to 17-inch laptops. Comfortable padded shoulder straps and back panel. Hidden anti-theft pocket for valuables. USB charging port for convenient device charging. Perfect for travel, hiking, and daily commute.

name: Smart Watch Fitness
description: Advanced fitness smartwatch with heart rate monitoring, GPS tracking, and sleep analysis. 1.4-inch AMOLED touchscreen display. Track 100+ workout modes including running, cycling, swimming (5ATM waterproof). Receive notifications, calls, and messages. 7-day battery life. Compatible with iOS and Android. Includes interchangeable bands.

name: Portable SSD 1TB
description: Ultra-fast portable solid-state drive with 1TB storage capacity. Read speeds up to 1050MB/s, write speeds up to 1000MB/s. Compact aluminum design fits in your pocket. USB-C 3.2 Gen 2 interface. Password protection and 256-bit AES hardware encryption. Shock-resistant and durable. Compatible with Windows, macOS, and Linux. Perfect for photographers, videographers, and content creators.

name: Bluetooth Speaker Portable
description: Powerful portable Bluetooth speaker with 360-degree sound. 20W output delivers rich, room-filling audio. IPX7 waterproof rating - perfect for pool parties and beach trips. 12-hour battery life. Built-in microphone for hands-free calls. Bluetooth 5.0 with 30-meter range. Compact design with carrying strap. Pairs with multiple speakers for stereo sound.

name: Denim Jeans Classic
description: Classic straight-fit denim jeans made from premium cotton denim. Comfortable mid-rise waist with five-pocket styling. Durable construction with reinforced stitching. Slight stretch for all-day comfort. Versatile dark wash works for casual or smart-casual occasions. Machine washable. Available in multiple sizes and inseam lengths.

name: Winter Jacket Insulated
description: Warm insulated winter jacket with water-resistant outer shell. Synthetic down insulation provides warmth without weight. Adjustable hood with faux fur trim. Multiple zippered pockets for secure storage. Elastic cuffs and drawstring hem seal out cold. Rated for temperatures down to -20°C. Available in multiple colors and sizes.

name: Athletic Shorts
description: Lightweight athletic shorts perfect for running, gym workouts, and sports. Moisture-wicking fabric keeps you dry and comfortable. Elastic waistband with internal drawstring. Side pockets and zippered back pocket. Reflective details for low-light visibility. Quick-drying material. Available in multiple colors and sizes.

name: System Design Interview Guide
description: Comprehensive guide to acing system design interviews at top tech companies. Covers scalability, load balancing, caching, databases, and microservices. Includes 20+ real-world system design problems with detailed solutions. Learn to design Twitter, Netflix, Uber, and more. Perfect for software engineers preparing for FAANG interviews.

name: Python for Data Science
description: Complete guide to Python programming for data science and machine learning. Covers NumPy, Pandas, Matplotlib, and Scikit-learn. Learn data manipulation, visualization, and statistical analysis. Includes hands-on projects with real datasets. Perfect for beginners and intermediate programmers entering data science.

name: Cloud Computing Essentials
description: Essential guide to cloud computing covering AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud Platform. Learn cloud architecture, deployment models, and best practices. Covers compute, storage, networking, and security. Includes certification preparation tips. Perfect for IT professionals and developers moving to the cloud.

name: 4K Webcam Pro
description: Professional-grade 4K webcam designed for content creators, streamers, and remote professionals. Captures stunning video at 4K/30fps or 1080p/60fps with Sony STARVIS sensor for exceptional low-light performance. Advanced autofocus system keeps you sharp even when moving. 90-degree field of view perfect for solo streams or small group calls. Dual omnidirectional microphones with noise reduction ensure crystal-clear audio. Built-in ring light with 3 brightness levels provides flattering illumination. Privacy shutter protects your privacy when not in use.

name: Monitor Stand Adjustable
description: Ergonomic monitor stand with height, tilt, and swivel adjustments. Supports monitors up to 32 inches and 20kg. Raises screen to eye level reducing neck strain. Built-in cable management keeps desk organized. Sturdy aluminum construction with non-slip base. Storage drawer underneath for office supplies. VESA mount compatible (75x75mm, 100x100mm). Easy tool-free assembly.

name: Desk Lamp LED
description: Modern LED desk lamp with touch controls and adjustable brightness. 5 color temperature modes from warm to cool white (3000K-6000K). Flexible gooseneck allows precise positioning. Energy-efficient LED lasts 50,000 hours. USB charging port built into base. Memory function remembers your last setting. Eye-caring technology reduces flicker and glare. Perfect for reading, studying, and working.

name: Webcam Cover Privacy Slider
description: Ultra-thin webcam cover privacy slider protects against hackers and unwanted surveillance. Simple slide mechanism opens and closes camera lens. Works with laptops, tablets, smartphones, and external webcams. Only 0.7mm thick - doesn't interfere with laptop closing. Strong adhesive sticks securely but removes cleanly. Pack of 3 covers. Essential privacy protection for remote workers and students.

name: Cable Organizer Set
description: Complete cable management solution with clips, sleeves, and ties. Includes 10 cable clips, 2 cable sleeves (1.5m each), 20 velcro ties, and 10 cable labels. Adhesive clips stick to any surface - desk, wall, or car. Flexible neoprene sleeves bundle multiple cables. Reusable velcro ties in multiple sizes. Keeps workspace tidy and cables untangled. Perfect for home office, entertainment center, or car.

name: Yoga Mat Premium
description: Premium non-slip yoga mat with superior cushioning and grip. 6mm thick provides excellent joint protection. TPE material is eco-friendly, non-toxic, and odor-free. Textured surface prevents slipping even during hot yoga. Lightweight and portable with carrying strap. Easy to clean - just wipe with damp cloth. Measures 183cm x 61cm. Perfect for yoga, Pilates, stretching, and floor exercises.

name: Water Bottle Insulated
description: Double-wall vacuum insulated stainless steel water bottle keeps drinks cold for 24 hours, hot for 12 hours. 750ml capacity with wide mouth opening for easy filling and cleaning. Leak-proof lid with carry handle. BPA-free and food-grade materials. Powder-coated exterior provides grip and prevents condensation. Fits most cup holders. Perfect for gym, hiking, office, and travel.

name: Dress Shirt Formal
description: Classic formal dress shirt perfect for business and special occasions. Made from premium cotton blend with wrinkle-resistant finish. Tailored fit with button-down collar and adjustable cuffs. Chest pocket and curved hem. Machine washable and easy to iron. Available in multiple colors and sizes. Pairs perfectly with suits or dress pants.

name: Sneakers Casual
description: Comfortable casual sneakers with classic low-top design. Canvas upper with rubber toe cap and sole. Cushioned insole provides all-day comfort. Lace-up closure for secure fit. Versatile style works with jeans, shorts, or casual pants. Durable construction built to last. Available in multiple colors and sizes. Perfect for everyday wear.

name: Baseball Cap Classic
description: Classic baseball cap with adjustable strap and curved brim. Made from durable cotton twill. Structured 6-panel design with reinforced front. Adjustable metal buckle closure fits most head sizes. Breathable eyelets keep you cool. Pre-curved brim provides sun protection. Available in multiple colors. Perfect for casual wear, sports, and outdoor activities.

name: Microservices Architecture
description: Comprehensive guide to designing and building microservices-based applications. Learn service decomposition, API design, inter-service communication, and deployment strategies. Covers Docker, Kubernetes, service mesh, and observability. Includes real-world case studies and best practices. Perfect for architects and senior developers building distributed systems.

name: React Complete Reference
description: Complete reference guide to React 18 and modern frontend development. Covers hooks, context, Redux, React Router, and testing. Learn component design patterns, performance optimization, and server-side rendering. Includes TypeScript integration and Next.js basics. Perfect for frontend developers building modern web applications.

name: Tablet Pro 11
description: Powerful 11-inch tablet perfect for productivity and entertainment. Stunning 2K display with 120Hz refresh rate. Octa-core processor with 8GB RAM and 256GB storage. All-day battery life (up to 10 hours). Supports stylus pen for note-taking and drawing. Quad speakers with Dolby Atmos. 13MP rear camera and 8MP front camera. Runs latest Android with desktop mode. Includes keyboard case. Perfect for students, artists, and professionals.

name: Gaming Mouse RGB Pro
description: Professional gaming mouse with 16000 DPI optical sensor and customizable RGB lighting. Features 8 programmable buttons with on-board memory for storing profiles. Ergonomic right-handed design with textured rubber grips. Adjustable weight system for personalized feel. Braided cable with gold-plated USB connector. Compatible with all major gaming software. Includes carrying case and extra glide pads. Perfect for FPS, MOBA, and MMO gaming.

name: USB Hub 7-Port
description: Powered USB 3.0 hub with 7 high-speed ports for connecting multiple devices. Individual LED indicators for each port. Includes 12V power adapter for charging tablets and external drives. Data transfer speeds up to 5Gbps. Compact aluminum design with non-slip rubber feet. Plug-and-play installation, no drivers needed. Compatible with Windows, macOS, Linux, and Chrome OS. Perfect for expanding laptop connectivity.

name: External Hard Drive 2TB
description: Portable external hard drive with 2TB storage capacity. USB 3.0 interface provides fast data transfer up to 120MB/s. Compact design fits in your pocket. Automatic backup software included. Password protection and hardware encryption for security. Shock-resistant design protects your data. Compatible with Windows and macOS (reformatting may be required). Perfect for backing up photos, videos, and documents.

name: Wireless Earbuds Pro
description: True wireless earbuds with active noise cancellation and transparency mode. Premium sound quality with 10mm dynamic drivers. Up to 8 hours playback per charge, 32 hours with charging case. IPX5 water resistance for workouts and rain. Touch controls for music, calls, and voice assistant. Fast charging: 10 minutes = 2 hours playback. Comfortable silicone ear tips in 3 sizes. Bluetooth 5.2 with stable connection.

name: Laptop Cooling Pad
description: Ergonomic laptop cooling pad with 5 ultra-quiet fans. Adjustable height settings for comfortable viewing angle. Dual USB ports for connecting peripherals. Fits laptops up to 17 inches. Metal mesh surface provides excellent heat dissipation. Blue LED lighting with on/off switch. Non-slip surface keeps laptop secure. Reduces laptop temperature by up to 15°C. Perfect for gaming and intensive work.

name: Graphics Tablet Digital
description: Professional graphics tablet with 8192 levels of pressure sensitivity. 10x6 inch active drawing area. Battery-free stylus with tilt recognition. 8 customizable express keys for shortcuts. Compatible with Photoshop, Illustrator, Corel Painter, and more. Works with Windows, macOS, and Linux. Includes pen holder with 8 replacement nibs. Perfect for digital artists, designers, and photo editors.

name: Power Bank 20000mAh
description: High-capacity portable charger with 20000mAh battery. Charges smartphones up to 5 times. Dual USB-A ports and USB-C port for charging 3 devices simultaneously. Fast charging support (18W). LED display shows remaining battery percentage. Built-in safety features prevent overcharging and overheating. Compact design with premium aluminum finish. Includes USB-C cable. Perfect for travel and emergencies.

name: Ring Light LED 10 inch
description: Professional 10-inch LED ring light with adjustable brightness and color temperature. 3 lighting modes: warm, natural, and cool white. Dimmable from 1% to 100%. Includes phone holder and Bluetooth remote. Adjustable tripod extends from 17 to 51 inches. Perfect for selfies, makeup tutorials, YouTube videos, and video calls. USB powered, works with power bank. 360-degree rotation for perfect angle.

name: Streaming Microphone USB
description: Professional USB condenser microphone for streaming, podcasting, and recording. Cardioid pickup pattern reduces background noise. Built-in pop filter and shock mount. Plug-and-play USB connection, no drivers needed. Mute button with LED indicator. Adjustable desktop stand included. Compatible with Windows, macOS, and PS4/PS5. Studio-quality sound for content creators. Includes windscreen foam cover.

name: HDMI Cable 4K 6ft
description: Premium HDMI 2.1 cable supporting 4K@120Hz and 8K@60Hz resolution. High-speed 48Gbps bandwidth for gaming and movies. Supports HDR, Dolby Vision, and eARC. Gold-plated connectors resist corrosion. Durable braided nylon jacket prevents tangling. Backward compatible with HDMI 2.0/1.4. 6-foot length perfect for TV and monitor setups. Certified for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X, and NVIDIA RTX graphics cards.

name: Laptop Stand Aluminum
description: Ergonomic aluminum laptop stand with adjustable height and angle. Raises screen to eye level reducing neck strain. Open design improves airflow and cooling. Supports laptops from 10 to 17 inches. Non-slip silicone pads protect laptop surface. Foldable design for easy portability. Cable management cutout keeps desk organized. Sturdy construction holds up to 10kg. Perfect for home office and remote work.

name: Phone Stand Adjustable
description: Universal adjustable phone stand compatible with all smartphones and tablets up to 12.9 inches. Fully adjustable angle and height. Sturdy aluminum alloy construction with anti-slip silicone pads. Foldable design for easy storage and travel. Cable cutout for charging while using. Perfect for video calls, watching videos, and following recipes. Works with cases up to 15mm thick. Available in multiple colors.

name: Webcam HD 1080p
description: Full HD 1080p webcam with autofocus and built-in dual microphones. Wide-angle 90-degree field of view perfect for video conferencing. Auto light correction for clear video in any lighting. USB plug-and-play, no drivers needed. Works with Zoom, Teams, Skype, and Google Meet. Adjustable clip fits monitors and laptops. Privacy shutter protects your privacy when not in use. Perfect for remote work and online learning.

name: Smart Watch Fitness Tracker
description: Advanced fitness smartwatch with heart rate monitor and GPS tracking. Tracks steps, calories, distance, and sleep quality. 1.4-inch AMOLED touchscreen display. Water resistant up to 50 meters for swimming. 14-day battery life on single charge. Receives notifications from smartphone. Multiple sport modes including running, cycling, and yoga. Includes interchangeable bands. Compatible with iOS and Android.

name: Portable SSD 1TB
description: Ultra-fast portable SSD with 1TB storage capacity. Read speeds up to 1050MB/s and write speeds up to 1000MB/s. Compact aluminum design fits in your pocket. USB-C 3.2 Gen 2 interface with included USB-C to USB-A cable. Hardware encryption and password protection. Shock and vibration resistant. Compatible with Windows, macOS, Android, and gaming consoles. Perfect for photographers and videographers.

name: Mechanical Keyboard RGB
description: Professional mechanical gaming keyboard with customizable RGB backlighting. Blue mechanical switches provide tactile feedback and satisfying click. Full-size layout with numeric keypad. Programmable macro keys for gaming and productivity. Detachable USB-C cable for easy transport. Aluminum frame construction for durability. N-key rollover and anti-ghosting. Includes wrist rest and keycap puller. Compatible with Windows and macOS.

name: Monitor 27 inch 4K
description: Professional 27-inch 4K UHD monitor with IPS panel technology. 3840x2160 resolution with 99% sRGB color accuracy. 60Hz refresh rate with AMD FreeSync support. HDR10 support for enhanced contrast. Ultra-thin bezels for multi-monitor setups. Adjustable stand with tilt, swivel, and height adjustment. Multiple inputs: HDMI, DisplayPort, and USB-C. Built-in speakers. Perfect for content creation and productivity.

name: Bluetooth Speaker Portable
description: Waterproof portable Bluetooth speaker with 360-degree sound. 20-hour battery life for all-day listening. IPX7 waterproof rating for pool and beach. Dual drivers deliver rich bass and clear highs. Built-in microphone for hands-free calls. Pair two speakers for stereo sound. Compact design with carabiner clip. USB-C charging. Bluetooth 5.0 with 100-foot range. Available in multiple colors.

name: Desk Lamp LED Smart
description: Smart LED desk lamp with adjustable brightness and color temperature. Touch controls with memory function. USB charging port for devices. Eye-caring LED technology reduces eye strain. Flexible gooseneck for precise positioning. Timer function for auto shut-off. Energy-efficient design uses 75% less energy. Modern minimalist design fits any workspace. Perfect for reading, studying, and working.

name: Cable Organizer Set
description: Complete cable management solution with multiple organizers. Includes cable clips, cable sleeves, cable ties, and cable box. Adhesive cable clips keep cables in place on desk or wall. Neoprene cable sleeve hides and protects multiple cables. Reusable cable ties in various sizes. Large cable box conceals power strips and excess cables. Keeps workspace clean and organized. Perfect for home and office.

name: Premium Cotton T-Shirt Navy
description: Classic navy blue t-shirt made from 100% premium combed cotton. Soft, breathable fabric perfect for everyday wear. Pre-shrunk to maintain size and shape after washing. Reinforced shoulder seams for durability. Tagless design for comfort. Available in sizes S to XXL. Machine washable and dryer safe. Versatile wardrobe essential that pairs with jeans, shorts, or layered under jackets. Timeless style for casual occasions.

name: Hoodie Fleece Gray
description: Comfortable fleece hoodie in heather gray. Made from soft cotton-polyester blend for warmth and durability. Kangaroo pocket for storing essentials. Adjustable drawstring hood. Ribbed cuffs and hem for better fit. Brushed interior for extra softness. Available in sizes S to XXL. Perfect for layering or wearing alone. Machine washable. Ideal for casual wear, workouts, or lounging at home.

name: Jeans Slim Fit Dark Blue
description: Modern slim-fit jeans in dark blue denim. Made from premium stretch denim with 2% elastane for comfort and flexibility. Five-pocket styling with button fly. Mid-rise waist sits comfortably at hips. Tapered leg opening for contemporary look. Reinforced stitching at stress points. Available in waist sizes 28-38 and inseam lengths 30-34. Machine washable. Perfect for casual and smart-casual occasions.

name: Running Shorts Athletic
description: Lightweight athletic running shorts with built-in liner. Made from moisture-wicking polyester fabric keeps you dry. Elastic waistband with internal drawcord for secure fit. Side pockets for keys and cards. Reflective details for visibility in low light. 7-inch inseam provides good coverage. Quick-drying fabric perfect for intense workouts. Available in sizes S to XXL. Machine washable. Ideal for running, gym, or casual wear.

name: Polo Shirt Pique White
description: Classic white polo shirt in breathable pique cotton. Three-button placket with ribbed collar and cuffs. Side vents for ease of movement. Pre-shrunk fabric maintains shape. Tagless design for comfort. Available in sizes S to XXL. Machine washable and easy to care for. Versatile piece suitable for golf, casual Fridays, or weekend outings. Timeless style that never goes out of fashion.

name: Sweatpants Jogger Black
description: Comfortable jogger-style sweatpants in classic black. Made from soft cotton-polyester fleece blend. Elastic waistband with adjustable drawstring. Tapered leg with elastic ankle cuffs. Side pockets and back pocket for storage. Brushed interior for warmth and comfort. Available in sizes S to XXL. Machine washable. Perfect for workouts, lounging, or casual outings. Modern athletic fit.

name: Tank Top Athletic Gray
description: Performance athletic tank top in heather gray. Made from moisture-wicking fabric keeps you cool and dry. Racerback design allows full range of motion. Flatlock seams prevent chafing. Lightweight and breathable for intense workouts. Available in sizes XS to XL. Machine washable and quick-drying. Perfect for running, gym, yoga, or layering. Modern athletic fit.

name: Dress Shirt Button-Down Blue
description: Classic button-down dress shirt in light blue. Made from wrinkle-resistant cotton blend for easy care. Button-down collar and chest pocket. Long sleeves with button cuffs. Tailored fit through body and sleeves. Available in neck sizes 14.5 to 17.5 and sleeve lengths 32-35. Machine washable, minimal ironing needed. Perfect for office, interviews, or formal occasions.

name: Jacket Windbreaker Navy
description: Lightweight windbreaker jacket in navy blue. Water-resistant nylon fabric protects from light rain. Full-zip front with chin guard. Elastic cuffs and adjustable hem. Two side pockets and one chest pocket. Packable design folds into its own pocket. Available in sizes S to XXL. Machine washable. Perfect for outdoor activities, travel, or layering. Unisex styling.

name: Leggings High-Waist Black
description: High-waisted athletic leggings in classic black. Made from stretchy, moisture-wicking fabric with four-way stretch. Wide waistband provides tummy control and stays in place. Hidden pocket in waistband for keys or cards. Flatlock seams prevent chafing. Squat-proof and non-see-through. Available in sizes XS to XXL. Machine washable. Perfect for yoga, running, gym, or everyday wear.

name: Sweater Crewneck Burgundy
description: Classic crewneck sweater in rich burgundy color. Made from soft cotton-acrylic blend. Ribbed collar, cuffs, and hem. Comfortable relaxed fit perfect for layering. Available in sizes S to XXL. Machine washable, lay flat to dry. Versatile piece suitable for casual or smart-casual occasions. Pairs well with jeans, chinos, or dress pants. Timeless wardrobe essential.

name: Shorts Cargo Khaki
description: Durable cargo shorts in classic khaki. Made from cotton twill fabric. Multiple pockets including cargo pockets on sides. Belt loops with button and zip fly. Relaxed fit with 10-inch inseam. Available in waist sizes 28-40. Machine washable and easy to care for. Perfect for outdoor activities, casual wear, or travel. Practical and comfortable summer essential.

name: Cardigan Knit Charcoal
description: Comfortable knit cardigan in charcoal gray. Made from soft acrylic-wool blend. Button-front closure with ribbed trim. Two front pockets for convenience. Available in sizes S to XXL. Machine washable, lay flat to dry. Perfect for layering over t-shirts or dress shirts. Suitable for office, casual outings, or home. Classic style that works year-round.

name: Vest Puffer Black
description: Insulated puffer vest in classic black. Lightweight synthetic insulation provides warmth without bulk. Water-resistant outer shell. Full-zip front with stand-up collar. Two zippered hand pockets and one interior pocket. Packable design for easy storage. Available in sizes S to XXL. Machine washable. Perfect for layering in cool weather. Versatile piece for outdoor activities or casual wear.

name: Chinos Slim Fit Olive
description: Modern slim-fit chino pants in olive green. Made from stretch cotton twill for comfort and mobility. Flat front with zip fly and button closure. Slant front pockets and button-through back pockets. Available in waist sizes 28-40 and inseam lengths 30-34. Machine washable, wrinkle-resistant. Perfect for smart-casual occasions, office, or weekend wear. Versatile alternative to jeans.

name: Henley Shirt Long Sleeve Gray
description: Classic long-sleeve henley shirt in heather gray. Made from soft cotton-polyester blend. Three-button placket with ribbed collar. Comfortable regular fit. Available in sizes S to XXL. Machine washable and easy to care for. Versatile piece that works alone or layered. Perfect for casual wear, lounging, or as a base layer. Timeless style for any season.

name: Flannel Shirt Plaid Red
description: Classic flannel shirt in red and black plaid pattern. Made from soft brushed cotton. Button-front closure with chest pockets. Long sleeves with button cuffs. Comfortable regular fit. Available in sizes S to XXL. Machine washable. Perfect for layering or wearing alone. Ideal for fall and winter casual wear. Timeless outdoor-inspired style.

name: Track Jacket Zip-Up Blue
description: Athletic track jacket with full-zip front in royal blue. Made from moisture-wicking polyester fabric. Stand-up collar and elastic cuffs. Two side pockets with zippers. Lightweight and breathable for active wear. Available in sizes S to XXL. Machine washable and quick-drying. Perfect for warm-ups, cool-downs, or casual athletic wear. Modern sporty style.

name: Swim Trunks Board Shorts Navy
description: Quick-dry board shorts for swimming and beach activities in navy blue. Made from lightweight polyester with mesh lining. Elastic waistband with drawstring. Back pocket with Velcro closure and drainage. 9-inch inseam provides good coverage. Available in sizes S to XXL. Machine washable and fast-drying. Perfect for swimming, surfing, or casual summer wear.

name: Thermal Underwear Set Black
description: Thermal base layer set including top and bottom in black. Made from soft fleece-lined fabric for maximum warmth. Moisture-wicking properties keep you dry. Stretchy fabric allows full range of motion. Flatlock seams prevent chafing. Available in sizes S to XXL. Machine washable. Perfect for cold weather activities, skiing, or layering under clothes. Lightweight yet warm.

name: The Midnight Library
description: Between life and death there is a library, and within that library, the shelves go on forever. Every book provides a chance to try another life you could have lived. While we all wonder how our lives might have been, what if you had the chance to go to the library and see for yourself? A dazzling novel about all the choices that go into a life well lived. Heartwarming and uplifting story about second chances and finding your purpose.

name: Atomic Habits
description: An Easy & Proven Way to Build Good Habits & Break Bad Ones. No matter your goals, Atomic Habits offers a proven framework for improving every day. James Clear, one of the world's leading experts on habit formation, reveals practical strategies that will teach you exactly how to form good habits, break bad ones, and master the tiny behaviors that lead to remarkable results. Transformative guide backed by science.

name: Where the Crawdads Sing
description: For years, rumors of the 'Marsh Girl' have haunted Barkley Cove, a quiet town on the North Carolina coast. So in late 1969, when handsome Chase Andrews is found dead, the locals immediately suspect Kya Clark, the so-called Marsh Girl. But Kya is not what they say. Sensitive and intelligent, she has survived for years alone in the marsh that she calls home. A powerful story of love, loss, and resilience.

name: The Seven Husbands of Evelyn Hugo
description: Aging and reclusive Hollywood movie icon Evelyn Hugo is finally ready to tell the truth about her glamorous and scandalous life. But when she chooses unknown magazine reporter Monique Grant for the job, no one is more astounded than Monique herself. Summoned to Evelyn's luxurious apartment, Monique listens in fascination as the actress tells her story. A mesmerizing journey through the splendor of old Hollywood into the harsh realities of the present day.

name: Educated: A Memoir
description: Tara Westover was seventeen the first time she set foot in a classroom. Born to survivalists in the mountains of Idaho, she prepared for the end of the world by stockpiling home-canned peaches. The first time she went to a doctor was at seventeen. Yet she taught herself enough mathematics and grammar to be admitted to Brigham Young University, where she studied history, learning for the first time about important world events. An unforgettable memoir about a young woman who questions her beliefs and her family.

name: The Silent Patient
description: Alicia Berenson's life is seemingly perfect. A famous painter married to an in-demand fashion photographer, she lives in a grand house with big windows overlooking a park in one of London's most desirable areas. One evening her husband Gabriel returns home late from a fashion shoot, and Alicia shoots him five times in the face, and then never speaks another word. A shocking psychological thriller that will keep you guessing until the final page.

name: Becoming
description: In her memoir, a work of deep reflection and mesmerizing storytelling, Michelle Obama invites readers into her world, chronicling the experiences that have shaped her—from her childhood on the South Side of Chicago to her years as an executive balancing the demands of motherhood and work, to her time spent at the world's most famous address. With unerring honesty and lively wit, she describes her triumphs and her disappointments, both public and private.

name: The Alchemist
description: Paulo Coelho's masterpiece tells the mystical story of Santiago, an Andalusian shepherd boy who yearns to travel in search of a worldly treasure. His quest will lead him to riches far different—and far more satisfying—than he ever imagined. Santiago's journey teaches us about the essential wisdom of listening to our hearts, of recognizing opportunity and learning to read the omens strewn along life's path, and, most importantly, to follow our dreams.

name: Sapiens: A Brief History of Humankind
description: From a renowned historian comes a groundbreaking narrative of humanity's creation and evolution that explores the ways in which biology and history have defined us and enhanced our understanding of what it means to be human. One hundred thousand years ago, at least six different species of humans inhabited Earth. Yet today there is only one—homo sapiens. What happened to the others? And what may happen to us? A thought-provoking exploration of human history.

name: The Subtle Art of Not Giving a F*ck
description: In this generation-defining self-help guide, a superstar blogger cuts through the crap to show us how to stop trying to be positive all the time so that we can truly become better, happier people. For decades, we've been told that positive thinking is the key to a happy, rich life. But those days are over. Mark Manson shows us that the key to being stronger people is to handle adversity better and stop trying to be positive all the time.

name: The Four Agreements
description: In The Four Agreements, don Miguel Ruiz reveals the source of self-limiting beliefs that rob us of joy and create needless suffering. Based on ancient Toltec wisdom, The Four Agreements offer a powerful code of conduct that can rapidly transform our lives to a new experience of freedom, true happiness, and love. The Four Agreements are: Be Impeccable With Your Word, Don't Take Anything Personally, Don't Make Assumptions, Always Do Your Best.

name: Thinking, Fast and Slow
description: In this work, psychologist Daniel Kahneman, winner of the Nobel Prize in Economics, takes us on a groundbreaking tour of the mind and explains the two systems that drive the way we think. System 1 is fast, intuitive, and emotional; System 2 is slower, more deliberative, and more logical. Kahneman exposes the extraordinary capabilities—and also the faults and biases—of fast thinking, and reveals the pervasive influence of intuitive impressions on our thoughts and behavior.

name: The Power of Now
description: To make the journey into the Now we will need to leave our analytical mind and its false created self, the ego, behind. From the very first page of this extraordinary book, we move rapidly into a significantly higher altitude where we breathe a lighter air. We become connected to the indestructible essence of our Being, the eternal, ever-present One Life beyond the myriad forms of life that are subject to birth and death.

name: The Great Gatsby
description: The Great Gatsby, F. Scott Fitzgerald's third book, stands as the supreme achievement of his career. This exemplary novel of the Jazz Age has been acclaimed by generations of readers. The story of the mysteriously wealthy Jay Gatsby and his love for the beautiful Daisy Buchanan, of lavish parties on Long Island at a time when The New York Times noted gin was the national drink and sex the national obsession, it is an exquisitely crafted tale of America in the 1920s.

Among the seminal texts of the 20th century, Nineteen Eighty-Four is a rare work that grows more haunting as its futuristic purgatory becomes more real. Published in 1949, the book offers political satirist George Orwell's nightmarish vision of a totalitarian, bureaucratic world and one poor stiff's attempt to find individuality. The brilliance of the novel is Orwell's prescience of modern life—the ubiquity of television, the distortion of the language—and his ability to construct such a thorough version of hell.

name: To Kill a Mockingbird
description: Harper Lee's Pulitzer Prize-winning masterwork of honor and injustice in the deep South—and the heroism of one man in the face of blind and violent hatred. One of the best-loved stories of all time, To Kill a Mockingbird has been translated into more than forty languages, sold more than forty million copies worldwide, served as the basis for an enormously popular motion picture, and was voted one of the best novels of the twentieth century by librarians across the country.

name: The Catcher in the Rye
description: The hero-narrator of The Catcher in the Rye is an ancient child of sixteen, a native New Yorker named Holden Caulfield. Through circumstances that tend to preclude adult, secondhand description, he leaves his prep school in Pennsylvania and goes underground in New York City for three days. The book is about Holden's stream of consciousness as he wanders through the city, and his observations about the phoniness of the adult world.

name: Pride and Prejudice
description: Since its immediate success in 1813, Pride and Prejudice has remained one of the most popular novels in the English language. Jane Austen called this brilliant work her own darling child and its vivacious heroine, Elizabeth Bennet, as delightful a creature as ever appeared in print. The romantic clash between the opinionated Elizabeth and her proud beau, Mr. Darcy, is a splendid performance of civilized sparring.

name: The Book Thief
description: It is 1939. Nazi Germany. The country is holding its breath. Death has never been busier, and will be busier still. By her brother's graveside, Liesel's life is changed when she picks up a single object, partially hidden in the snow. It is The Gravedigger's Handbook, left behind there by accident, and it is her first act of book thievery. So begins a love affair with books and words, as Liesel, with the help of her accordion-playing foster father, learns to read.

name: The Hobbit
description: Bilbo Baggins is a hobbit who enjoys a comfortable, unambitious life, rarely traveling any farther than his pantry or cellar. But his contentment is disturbed when the wizard Gandalf and a company of dwarves arrive on his doorstep one day to whisk him away on an adventure. They have launched a plot to raid the treasure hoard guarded by Smaug the Magnificent, a large and very dangerous dragon. A glorious account of a magnificent adventure filled with danger and narrow escapes.

name: Laptop Backpack Water-Resistant
description: Durable laptop backpack with padded compartment fits laptops up to 17 inches. Water-resistant polyester fabric protects contents from rain. Multiple compartments and pockets for organization. Padded shoulder straps and back panel for comfort. USB charging port with cable inside. Anti-theft hidden zipper design. Luggage strap fits over suitcase handle. Perfect for business, travel, and daily commute.

name: Screen Protector Tempered Glass
description: Premium tempered glass screen protector with 9H hardness rating. Protects against scratches, drops, and impacts. Ultra-clear with 99.9% transparency maintains screen clarity. Oleophobic coating resists fingerprints and smudges. Easy bubble-free installation with alignment tool. Case-friendly design works with most phone cases. Includes cleaning kit and installation guide. Compatible with iPhone and Samsung Galaxy models.

name: Phone Case Silicone Clear
description: Slim transparent silicone phone case shows off your phone's original design. Soft TPU material provides shock absorption and drop protection. Raised edges protect camera and screen. Precise cutouts for all ports and buttons. Anti-yellowing technology keeps case clear longer. Wireless charging compatible. Easy to install and remove. Available for iPhone and Samsung Galaxy models.

name: Wireless Charger Pad Fast
description: Fast wireless charging pad supports up to 15W charging speed. Compatible with iPhone, Samsung, and all Qi-enabled devices. LED indicator shows charging status. Non-slip surface keeps phone secure. Includes USB-C cable and wall adapter. Slim design fits on any desk or nightstand. Case-friendly charges through cases up to 5mm. Overcharge and overheat protection for safety.

name: PopSocket Phone Grip
description: Collapsible phone grip and stand with strong adhesive. Extends and collapses for one-handed use. Works as a stand for watching videos. Repositionable and sticks to most devices and cases. Swappable top allows design changes. Compatible with wireless charging when collapsed. Available in multiple colors and designs. Perfect for preventing drops and improving grip.

name: Car Phone Mount Magnetic
description: Strong magnetic car phone mount with 360-degree rotation. Attaches to air vent with secure clip. Powerful magnets hold phone firmly even on bumpy roads. One-hand operation for easy mounting and removal. Includes metal plates for phones and cases. Compact design doesn't block view. Works with all smartphones. Perfect for GPS navigation and hands-free calling.

name: AirPods Case Silicone
description: Protective silicone case for AirPods charging case. Soft silicone material protects from scratches and drops. Precise cutouts for charging port and pairing button. Carabiner clip attaches to bags or belt loops. Wireless charging compatible. Easy to clean and maintain. Available in multiple colors. Fits AirPods 1st and 2nd generation.

name: Gaming Headset RGB 7.1
description: Professional gaming headset with virtual 7.1 surround sound. 50mm drivers deliver immersive audio. Noise-canceling microphone with flip-to-mute function. Comfortable memory foam ear cushions for long gaming sessions. RGB lighting with multiple color modes. In-line volume and mute controls. Compatible with PC, PS4, PS5, Xbox, and Nintendo Switch. Braided cable with 3.5mm jack and USB adapter.

name: Security Camera WiFi Indoor
description: Smart WiFi security camera with 1080p HD video. Pan, tilt, and zoom remotely via smartphone app. Night vision up to 30 feet. Two-way audio for communication. Motion detection with instant alerts. Cloud and SD card storage options. Works with Alexa and Google Assistant. Easy setup with WiFi connection. Perfect for home security and pet monitoring.

name: Smart Plug WiFi Mini
description: Compact WiFi smart plug works with Alexa and Google Assistant. Control devices remotely via smartphone app. Set schedules and timers for automation. Energy monitoring tracks power consumption. Compact design doesn't block adjacent outlets. No hub required, connects directly to WiFi. Supports up to 15A load. Perfect for lamps, fans, and small appliances.

name: Drone with Camera 4K
description: Foldable drone with 4K UHD camera and 3-axis gimbal stabilization. GPS-assisted flight with return-to-home function. 30-minute flight time per battery. Transmission range up to 1.2 miles. Intelligent flight modes including follow me and orbit. Obstacle avoidance sensors. Includes carrying case and extra battery. Perfect for aerial photography and videography.

name: VR Headset Standalone
description: All-in-one virtual reality headset with no PC required. Fast-switch LCD display with 1832x1920 per eye resolution. 90Hz refresh rate for smooth gameplay. Inside-out tracking with 6DOF controllers. Built-in spatial audio. Access to thousands of VR games and experiences. 128GB storage. Adjustable head strap for comfort. Perfect for gaming and immersive entertainment.

name: E-Reader 7 inch
description: Lightweight e-reader with 7-inch glare-free display. Reads like real paper even in bright sunlight. Adjustable warm light for comfortable reading day and night. Holds thousands of books with 16GB storage. Weeks of battery life on single charge. Waterproof design (IPX8) for reading in bath or pool. Access to millions of books, magazines, and audiobooks. Perfect for book lovers.

name: Action Camera 4K Waterproof
description: Compact 4K action camera with waterproof housing up to 100 feet. 20MP photos and 4K/60fps video. Electronic image stabilization for smooth footage. 2-inch touchscreen display. WiFi and Bluetooth connectivity. Voice control for hands-free operation. Multiple mounting accessories included. 2-hour battery life. Perfect for sports, travel, and adventure.

name: Digital Photo Frame 10 inch
description: WiFi digital photo frame with 10-inch IPS touchscreen. 1280x800 resolution displays photos in vivid detail. 16GB internal storage plus cloud access. Auto-rotate and slideshow features. Share photos instantly via smartphone app. Motion sensor turns on when you approach. Adjustable brightness and color settings. Includes remote control and stand. Perfect gift for family.

name: 4K Monitor 27-inch
description: Professional 4K UHD monitor with stunning 27-inch display. IPS panel delivers accurate colors and wide viewing angles. 3840x2160 resolution for crisp, detailed images. HDR10 support for enhanced contrast. Multiple ports including HDMI 2.0, DisplayPort 1.4, and USB-C. Perfect for content creation, gaming, and professional work.

name: Webcam HD Pro
description: Professional 1080p HD webcam with autofocus and dual microphones. Crystal-clear video calls and streaming. Wide-angle 90-degree field of view. Built-in ring light with adjustable brightness. USB plug-and-play, no drivers needed. Compatible with Zoom, Teams, Skype. Perfect for remote work and content creation.

name: External Hard Drive 4TB
description: Reliable 4TB external hard drive for backup and storage. USB 3.0 for fast data transfer up to 5Gbps. Automatic backup software included. Compact, portable design. Password protection and hardware encryption. Compatible with Windows and macOS. Perfect for photographers, videographers, and data hoarders.

name: Bluetooth Speaker Portable
description: Powerful portable Bluetooth speaker with 360-degree sound. 20W output delivers room-filling audio. IPX7 waterproof rating for pool and beach. 24-hour battery life for all-day music. Built-in microphone for hands-free calls. Pairs with two devices simultaneously. Compact design with carabiner clip.

name: Gaming Mouse RGB
description: High-precision gaming mouse with 16000 DPI optical sensor. Customizable RGB lighting with 16.8 million colors. 8 programmable buttons with on-board memory. Ergonomic right-handed design. Braided cable and gold-plated USB connector. Adjustable weight system. Perfect for FPS, MOBA, and MMO games.

name: USB Hub 7-Port
description: Powered 7-port USB 3.0 hub with individual power switches. Transfer data at up to 5Gbps. LED indicators show port status. Includes 12V power adapter for charging tablets and smartphones. Compact design saves desk space. Compatible with Windows, macOS, and Linux. Plug-and-play installation.

name: Tablet 10-inch Android
description: Versatile 10.1-inch Android tablet for entertainment and productivity. Full HD display with vibrant colors. Octa-core processor, 4GB RAM, 64GB storage (expandable). Dual cameras for photos and video calls. Long-lasting 7000mAh battery. Lightweight aluminum body. Perfect for reading, browsing, and media consumption.

name: Power Bank 20000mAh
description: High-capacity 20000mAh power bank charges phones multiple times. Dual USB-A outputs and USB-C input/output. Fast charging support up to 18W. LED display shows remaining battery percentage. Compact size fits in bags and pockets. Built-in safety features prevent overcharging. Perfect for travel and emergencies.

name: Wireless Earbuds Pro 1
description: Premium true wireless earbuds with active noise cancellation. Premium sound quality with deep bass and clear highs. Touch controls for music and calls. Water-resistant design (IPX4). Includes charging case with wireless charging. Long battery life up to 8 hours per charge.

description: Premium true wireless earbuds with active noise cancellation. Premium sound quality with deep bass and clear highs. Touch controls for music and calls. Water-resistant design (IPX4). Includes charging case with wireless charging. Long battery life up to 8 hours per charge.

name: Drone Camera HD
description: Quadcopter drone with 1080p HD camera. GPS-assisted flight with auto-return home. 20-minute flight time. Foldable design for portability. Includes remote controller and spare batteries. Perfect for aerial photography and videography.

name: E-Reader 7-inch
description: Dedicated e-reader with 7-inch glare-free display. Perfect for reading in bright sunlight. Weeks of battery life on a single charge. Stores thousands of books. Built-in adjustable warm light. Waterproof design (IPX8). Access to millions of titles.

name: Graphics Tablet Pro
description: Professional graphics drawing tablet with pressure-sensitive pen. 8192 levels of pressure sensitivity. 10x6 inch active area. Battery-free stylus with tilt support. Compatible with Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, and other creative software. Perfect for digital artists and designers.

name: Smart Doorbell Camera
description: Wi-Fi enabled video doorbell with HD camera and two-way audio. Motion detection with instant mobile notifications. Night vision for 24/7 monitoring. Cloud storage and local recording options. Easy installation. Works with Alexa and Google Assistant.

name: Winter Jacket Insulated
description: Warm insulated winter jacket with water-resistant outer shell. Premium down insulation keeps you warm in cold weather. Adjustable hood with faux fur trim. Multiple pockets for storage. Durable zipper with storm flap. Available in various colors and sizes.

name: Yoga Pants Athletic
description: High-waisted yoga pants with four-way stretch fabric. Moisture-wicking material keeps you dry during workouts. Flattering fit with tummy control. Hidden pocket for keys or cards. Non-see-through fabric. Perfect for yoga, running, or casual wear.

name: Dress Shirt Formal
description: Classic formal dress shirt perfect for business or special occasions. Wrinkle-resistant fabric stays crisp all day. Tailored fit with modern cut. Button-down collar and long sleeves. Machine washable for easy care. Available in multiple sizes.

name: Casual Shorts Summer
description: Comfortable casual shorts perfect for summer. Lightweight breathable fabric. Elastic waistband with drawstring. Multiple pockets including zippered back pocket. Quick-dry material. Perfect for beach, sports, or lounging.

name: System Design Interview Guide
description: Essential guide for acing system design interviews at top tech companies. Learn how to design scalable distributed systems. Covers load balancing, caching, databases, and microservices. Includes real interview questions and solutions. Perfect for software engineers preparing for FAANG interviews.

name: Cloud Architecture Patterns
description: Comprehensive guide to cloud architecture patterns and best practices. Learn AWS, Azure, and GCP services. Covers serverless, containers, and infrastructure as code. Includes case studies and real-world examples. Perfect for cloud architects and DevOps engineers.

name: Cybersecurity Fundamentals
description: Essential cybersecurity concepts and practices. Learn about network security, encryption, and threat detection. Covers ethical hacking and penetration testing. Includes hands-on labs and exercises. Perfect for IT professionals and security enthusiasts.

name: Data Structures Algorithms
description: Complete guide to data structures and algorithms. Learn arrays, linked lists, trees, graphs, and more. Covers sorting, searching, and dynamic programming. Includes code examples in multiple languages. Perfect for computer science students and interview prep.
